name: Plex
description: Media server and streaming client for organizing, streaming, and sharing your personal media library across devices

extraction.pattern: Follow redirect to get the versioned download URL, parse version from URL path. Potential Sparkle feed URL not publicly documented.
extraction.notes: May also be accessible via Homebrew cask version tracking (brew info plex)

download.url: https://plex.tv/downloads/latest/5?channel=8&build=macos-x86_64 — follows redirect to versioned DMG URL

release_date.field: Forum post date from Plex Media Server announcements category

notes: Uses a channel/build redirect pattern for downloads. The URL https://plex.tv/downloads/latest/5?channel=8&build=macos-x86_64 redirects to the latest versioned DMG. Sparkle feed URL is not publicly documented (may be embedded in the app). Also available via Homebrew (plex-media-server). Channel 8 = public stable. Also has Plex HTPC and Plexamp companion apps.
